contactsPage.title: Contacts Page

contactsPage.heading: Contacts

contactsPage.markInactiveSuccess: {{name}} has been marked as inactive successfully.

lastPhoneTypeUsage.title: Last Phone Type Usage
lastPhoneTypeUsage.message: The following custom phone type{{suffix}} no longer used by any contact: {{labels}}. Delete the type definition{{definitionSuffix}}, or keep for future use?

contactDetails.title: Contact Details
contactDetails.description: Contact detail view with tabs, inline editing, portal access, tags, and notes

fields.inboundTicketDestinationHelp: If set, this overrides the client destination for this exact sender contact. Precedence: Contact override -> Client destination -> Provider default.

status.label: Status
status.helper: Set contact status as active or inactive

delete.validationFailed: Failed to validate deletion. Please try again.
delete.failed: Failed to delete contact. Please try again.

deactivate.successDescription: Contact has been marked as inactive successfully.

update.successDescription: Contact details have been saved successfully.

saveFailed.title: Save Failed
saveFailed.description: Could not save contact details. Please try again.

errors.permissionDenied: Permission denied. Please contact your administrator if you need additional access.
errors.markInactiveFailed: An error occurred while marking the contact as inactive. Please try again.
errors.reactivateFailed: An error occurred while reactivating the contact. Please try again.

contactsImportDialog.title: Import Contacts
contactsImportDialog.description: CSV import dialog for contact mapping, preview, validation, and results

errors.emptyCsv: CSV file is empty or invalid

skipInvalid.title: Skip invalid records
skipInvalid.description: Continue import even if some records have validation errors

upload.help: Upload a CSV file with contact data
upload.contactFieldsDescription: phone_number (imports as the default work phone), role, notes, tags
upload.noteDescription: CSV import/export in v1 handles one default phone number per contact. Tags should be comma-separated values.

mapping.title: Map Contact Fields to CSV Columns
mapping.description: Select which CSV column contains the data for each contact field. Fields marked with * are required.
mapping.requiredFieldsNote: * Required fields must be mapped for import to proceed
mapping.largeImportWarning: You are importing {{count}} records. Processing may take a moment.

confirmUpdate.title: Update Existing Contacts
confirmUpdate.message: {{count}} contacts already exist. Do you want to update them with the new data?

contactPhoneNumbersEditor.title: Contact Phone Numbers
contactPhoneNumbersEditor.description: Phone number editor with type management, validation, defaults, and extension support

contactPortalTab.title: Portal Access
contactPortalTab.description: Client portal access management for a contact, including invitations and role updates

quickAddContact.title: Add New Contact
quickAddContact.description: Quick-add form for creating a contact with client, role, phone, and tag fields

contactDetailsEdit.title: Edit Contact
contactDetailsEdit.description: Editable contact form used from the detail view and drawer flows

contactDetailsView.title: Contact Summary
contactDetailsView.description: Read-oriented contact summary with associated client, phones, and metadata

clientContactsList.title: Client Contacts
clientContactsList.description: Embedded client-specific contacts list with filters and row actions

contactsLayout.description: Contacts route shell and page chrome
